results.description: INVESTIGATE AND ENHANCE THE MANUFACTURING TECHNOLOGIES USED FOR THE FABRICATION OF UNMANNED SURFACE VESSELS (USVS) AND RELATED MARITIME STRUCTURES DEVELOP DIGITAL MANUFACTURING SOFTWARE TOOLS WHICH ARE PROCESS-AWARE THAT DRIVE DESIGN CHOICES TOWARDS

INVESTIGATE AND ENHANCE THE MANUFACTURING TECHNOLOGIES USED FOR THE FABRICATION OF UNMANNED SURFACE VESSELS (USVS) AND RELATED MARITIME STRUCTURES; DEVELOP DIGITAL MANUFACTURING SOFTWARE TOOLS WHICH ARE PROCESS-AWARE THAT DRIVE DESIGN CHOICES TOWARDS

THIS EFFORT INVESTIGATES/ENHANCES THE MANUFACTURING TECHNOLOGY USED TO FABRICATE UNMANNED SURFACE VESSELS AND MARITIME STRUCTURES, DEVELOPS DIGITAL MANUFACTURING SOFTWARE TOOLS, AND PERFORMS EXPERIMENTATION TO EVALUATE COST AND PERFORMANCE MODELS.
